name: TechCloudPro Placement Outreach
subject: We Place the Right Talent. You Pay Only When It Works.
preheader: Contract at $2/hr. Full-time at 15%. No surprises, no markups.
body_plain:
Hi [First Name],

Finding the right tech talent shouldn't cost you a fortune — or your sanity. Most staffing firms charge 15–20% markup on contractor rates and 20–25% on full-time salaries. We do it differently.

CONTRACT PLACEMENTS: $2/hr flat fee on top of candidate rate. No percentage markups. Scales with your team. Transparent monthly billing.

FULL-TIME PLACEMENTS: 15% of first-year salary. Industry average is 20–25%. One-time fee, 90-day replacement guarantee, no hidden fees.

Our database: 18,000+ pre-screened tech candidates — NetSuite specialists, developers, QA engineers, project managers, and more.

TechCloudPro has placed 200+ candidates with Fortune 500 companies.

Book a 15-min call: https://calendly.com/rajesh-techcloudpro

Rajesh Kumar
Senior Talent Partner — TechCloudPro / BrandMonkz
rajesh@techcloudpro.com | +1 (555) 000-0000
